name: Orca Security
description: Agentless cloud security platform providing CNAPP, CSPM, CWPP, and vulnerability management across multi-cloud environments

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve security alerts with optional filters for severity, status, and alert type

parameters.name: dsl_filter
parameters.description: DSL filter expression for alert filtering

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Pagination token for next page of results

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific security alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: List discovered cloud assets across all connected cloud accounts

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type (e.g., vm, container, serverless, storage)

parameters.name: cloud_provider
parameters.description: Filter by cloud provider (aws, azure, gcp)

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific cloud asset including risk score and findings

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: Search Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Search for vulnerabilities across cloud workloads with CVE and severity filtering

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: has_fix
parameters.description: Filter for vulnerabilities with available fixes

actions.name: Get Compliance Status
actions.description: Retrieve compliance assessment results for a specific framework

parameters.name: framework_name
parameters.description: Compliance framework name (e.g., CIS, SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA)

actions.name: Update Alert Status
actions.description: Update the status of a security alert (dismiss, snooze, or reopen)

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert
